items.name: Quiet Winter Grace Modest Coat Dress [PBR]
items.description:
❄️🩶 Soft structure meets elegant modesty in a calm, winter-ready design.
This refined modest coat dress features a beautifully quilted upper bodice paired with a softly flared skirt, creating a balanced silhouette that feels both warm and graceful. The muted gray-green tone gives a sophisticated, understated presence, while the high neckline and long sleeves ensure full modest coverage. Subtle volume in the skirt adds gentle movement, making it ideal for elegant winter scenes, calm roleplay settings, fantasy towns, or refined NPC styling. Premium PBR textures enhance the quilted fabric, natural folds, and soft shadows for a realistic, high-quality finish.
🔍 Keywords:
modest, coat dress, quilted, winter fashion, elegant, long dress, layered, calm, fantasy, roleplay, PBR
Wrap your avatar in quiet elegance and refined warmth with this timeless modest coat dress.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: Type 5 Tetsukabuto Helmet, Ashigaru
items.description:
Join group here:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/871600589/HEART-OF-THE-SKORPIAN#!/store

Isavian service steel helmet througout the Skorpian War, issued since 1937, it featured a fairly comfortable liner made from pigskin, something that is used for many Isavian equipments. A multi-tool for the Isavian soldiers, who would use it as eating bowl, cooking pot, carrying water and whatever else the soldier that use it can think of.

This version featured the Ashigaru units camouflage net, unlike Cyaniten Special Forces and Light Infantry, the Elites of Isavo don't use facepaint, and opted for a camouflage net, which give better camouflage but less vision and fairly uncomfortable when wearing for a long period, it's not a problem for Elites unit who are too used to the brutality of war and prefer performance and maximum effectiveness.
